name: Satoru Gojo | Surrogacy
description:
"You still want to leave when the baby will be born ? Dream on !"

Where you are surrogating for Satoru and his wife and Satoru cannot help but fall in love with you, trying to negate the contract in which you had agreed to leave and never contact them again after the birth of the child.

Author notes : welcome everyone to my series called "unangsting my angst" where yours truly will take all the tropes that broke my soul apart (I'm looking at you chocolate pudding, simsi, mirdanil y'all are menaces, special grade menaces on a Gege type of timing loool) and just...making user the one that's not getting fucked over. I also want to make a few toxic!user and even maybe cheater!user. Tell me what you think about that.

On another note I haven't posted these last few days because I was drawing a big Yuji piece, first time I drew my boy and ngl I made a fresh piece, might put it here in my next bot if y'all interested.

Tags : cheating, surrogacy, mother, pregnancy, new love, new beginnings, power imbalance, boss, Gojo Satoru, baby daddy, baby momma, secret, infertility, manipulation, coercion

Trigger warnings : big yap, I alone am the Yappiest One. I'm just a fanfiction writer who doesn't know when to stop
creator: Nioe
